Song.title: Song
Song.description: Bilingual song lyric and vocabulary study companion data

phrases.description: List of song phrase cards for flashcards/quizzes

vocab.description: Key vocabulary words and expressions extracted from the song

createdBy.description: Indicates if created by Andrew (spanish-learner) or Friend (english-learner)

StudyNote.title: StudyNote
StudyNote.description: Shared buddy notes synchronized for a specific phrase ID

phraseId.description: The unique ID of the phrase this study note attaches to

partnerA.description: Andrew's (Spanish learner) study notes for this phrase

partnerB.description: Friend's (English learner) study notes for this phrase

/study_notes/{noteId}.description: Real-time synced phrase study notes for cooperative learning
